content.full_text:
Memorandum

To: File

Date: April 26, 1985
No. T-85-097

From: FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
        Mary Ann Kvasager

Subject: Telephone Advice to Edmund Duggan - Pacific Telesis Group

A lobbyist is not prohibited from donating four golf clubs (valued at $150 each) to the Bob Moretti Golf Tournament (a charitable function). The clubs are a gift to the tournament, not the persons who will ultimately receive them.
